news.title:
Indian banks wrote off Rs 1.72 lakh crore loans in FY25, with retail loans at Rs 45,404 crore topping write-offs.
Retail loan share rose to 26.4% in FY25; recovery rates from write-offs improved to 34.8%, per Finance Ministry data.
news.summary:
Indian banks wrote off Rs 1.72 lakh crore loans in FY25, with retail loans at Rs 45,404 crore topping write-offs.
Retail loan share rose to 26.4% in FY25; recovery rates from write-offs improved to 34.8%, per Finance Ministry data.

news.title:
Indian Bank gets AAA Stable rating for Rs.5000 cr infra bonds from CARE and CRISIL.
Existing bonds and issuer ratings reaffirmed, showing strong credit profile and stable outlook.
news.summary:
Indian Bank gets AAA Stable rating for Rs.5000 cr infra bonds from CARE and CRISIL.
Existing bonds and issuer ratings reaffirmed, showing strong credit profile and stable outlook.

news.title:
Indian Bank sees sharp open interest surge, showing strong market positioning.
The stock hit a 52-week high of Rs 985.8 with robust volume and positive action.
news.summary:
Indian Bank sees sharp open interest surge, showing strong market positioning.
The stock hit a 52-week high of Rs 985.8 with robust volume and positive action.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Indian Bank-led consortium invites bids to sell ₹738.2 cr BLA Power bad loans.
The sale follows the Swiss challenge method with an anchor bid of ₹285 cr.
news.summary:
Indian Bank-led consortium invites bids to sell ₹738.2 cr BLA Power bad loans.
The sale follows the Swiss challenge method with an anchor bid of ₹285 cr.

news.title:
Indian Bank's open interest surged 10%, reaching 18,626 contracts, indicating higher market activity.
Robust volumes and proximity to 52-week high suggest bullish bets on Indian Bank's stock.
news.summary:
Indian Bank's open interest surged 10%, reaching 18,626 contracts, indicating higher market activity.
Robust volumes and proximity to 52-week high suggest bullish bets on Indian Bank's stock.

news.title:
Indian Bank revises Treasury Bills Linked Lending Rates (TBLR) effective from 03.02.2026.
MCLR, Base Rate, BPLR, Policy Repo Rate, and RBLR remain unchanged as per announcement.
news.summary:
Indian Bank revises Treasury Bills Linked Lending Rates (TBLR) effective from 03.02.2026.
MCLR, Base Rate, BPLR, Policy Repo Rate, and RBLR remain unchanged as per announcement.

news.title:
PSU Bank stocks fell sharply after Budget 2026 due to record borrowing of ₹17.2 lakh crore by the government.
Bank of India, Indian Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, and Bank of Baroda lost 5-6% amid treasury loss concerns.
news.summary:
PSU Bank stocks fell sharply after Budget 2026 due to record borrowing of ₹17.2 lakh crore by the government.
Bank of India, Indian Bank, Bank of Maharashtra, and Bank of Baroda lost 5-6% amid treasury loss concerns.

news.title:
PSU bank shares, including Bank of India, Bank of Baroda, and Indian Bank, dropped after FM Nirmala Sitharaman proposed a banking review panel.
The panel aims to assess reforms for growth, financial stability, inclusion, and restructuring NBFCs like PFC and REC for efficiency.
news.summary:
PSU bank shares, including Bank of India, Bank of Baroda, and Indian Bank, dropped after FM Nirmala Sitharaman proposed a banking review panel.
The panel aims to assess reforms for growth, financial stability, inclusion, and restructuring NBFCs like PFC and REC for efficiency.

news.title:
Indian Bank's valuation shifts to fair, moving from expensive territory.
P/E and P/BV ratios indicate renewed price attractiveness versus peers.
news.summary:
Indian Bank's valuation shifts to fair, moving from expensive territory.
P/E and P/BV ratios indicate renewed price attractiveness versus peers.

news.title:
Indian Bank reported a 13.3% YoY growth in total business reaching Rs 14.3 trillion in Q3 FY26. Deposits grew 12.6% to Rs 7.91 trillion, while advances grew 14.2% to Rs 6.39 trillion.
Net profit increased by 7.3% to Rs 3,061 crore, with operating profit surpassing Rs 5,000 crore for the first time. Gross NPA improved to 2.23%, and net NPA reduced to 0.15%.
news.summary:
Indian Bank reported a 13.3% YoY growth in total business reaching Rs 14.3 trillion in Q3 FY26. Deposits grew 12.6% to Rs 7.91 trillion, while advances grew 14.2% to Rs 6.39 trillion.
Net profit increased by 7.3% to Rs 3,061 crore, with operating profit surpassing Rs 5,000 crore for the first time. Gross NPA improved to 2.23%, and net NPA reduced to 0.15%.

news.title:
Large private banks like Kotak Mahindra Bank and HDFC Bank report slower growth (9-12%), while PSU banks gain market share, with Indian Bank and others showing strong performance.
NBFCs like Muthoot Finance and Fedfina excel in gold loans; IndusInd Bank stabilizes; SBI outperforms but growth aligns with sector at 11-12%.
news.summary:
Large private banks like Kotak Mahindra Bank and HDFC Bank report slower growth (9-12%), while PSU banks gain market share, with Indian Bank and others showing strong performance.
NBFCs like Muthoot Finance and Fedfina excel in gold loans; IndusInd Bank stabilizes; SBI outperforms but growth aligns with sector at 11-12%.

news.title:
Indian Bank reports strong Q3 FY26 results with improved margins.
MD & CEO highlights rising corporate loan demand from renewables, data centers, and logistics.
news.summary:
Indian Bank reports strong Q3 FY26 results with improved margins.
MD & CEO highlights rising corporate loan demand from renewables, data centers, and logistics.

news.title: Motilal Oswal reiterates BUY on Indian Bank with a revised target of ₹1,025, up from ₹900.
news.summary: Motilal Oswal reiterates BUY on Indian Bank with a revised target of ₹1,025, up from ₹900.

news.title:
Indian Bank aims for 12-13% credit growth, exceeding guidance while focusing on asset quality.
Management remains optimistic about sustaining growth levels into the next year.
news.summary:
Indian Bank aims for 12-13% credit growth, exceeding guidance while focusing on asset quality.
Management remains optimistic about sustaining growth levels into the next year.

news.title:
Indian Bank targets Gross NPA below 2% and Net NPA at 0.5%.
Current slippage ratio expected to persist despite minor March fluctuations.
news.summary:
Indian Bank targets Gross NPA below 2% and Net NPA at 0.5%.
Current slippage ratio expected to persist despite minor March fluctuations.

news.title:
Indian Bank achieved INR198,350 crores in digital business for 9M FY26.
The bank is confident of surpassing its INR225,000 crore FY26 target.
news.summary:
Indian Bank achieved INR198,350 crores in digital business for 9M FY26.
The bank is confident of surpassing its INR225,000 crore FY26 target.

news.title:
Indian Bank's 9-month recovery of INR 5,153 cr aligns with guidance of INR 5,500-6,500 cr.
The slippage ratio of 0.69% remains within the projected limits.
news.summary:
Indian Bank's 9-month recovery of INR 5,153 cr aligns with guidance of INR 5,500-6,500 cr.
The slippage ratio of 0.69% remains within the projected limits.

news.title:
Indian Bank announced the availability of audio-video recordings of its post-earnings concall on its website.
The recordings follow SEBI LODR regulations and were disclosed to NSE and BSE.
news.summary:
Indian Bank announced the availability of audio-video recordings of its post-earnings concall on its website.
The recordings follow SEBI LODR regulations and were disclosed to NSE and BSE.

news.title:
Indian Bank surged 5.1% on 22 Jan 2026, hitting an intraday high of 888.4.
The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices during the session.
news.summary:
Indian Bank surged 5.1% on 22 Jan 2026, hitting an intraday high of 888.4.
The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices during the session.
